ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the workclass category */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight of the individual (used for weighted statistical analysis) */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Numeric code for the education level */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marital status */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the relationship status */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked per week */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the native country */,
  "income_level" INTEGER /* Income level (1 for >50K, 0 for <=50K) */,
  "income_tax" TEXT /* Income tax paid by the individual */,
  "health_insurance" INTEGER /* Whether the individual has health insurance */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Whether the individual has a disability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES native_countries ("native_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income_level FOREIGN KEY ("income_level") REFERENCES income_levels ("income_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the workclass */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workclass */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workclasses_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* Degree level (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "job_category" TEXT /* Job category (e.g., technical, non-technical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship status */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_countries" (
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each native country */,
  "native_country_name" TEXT /* Name of the native country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the native country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("native_country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the income level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income level */,
  "tax_bracket" TEXT /* Tax bracket for the income level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_name" TEXT /* Name of the data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the data version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report the visualization belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
